PluginData.Author: kickformoney
PluginData.Tooltip: Adds head tracking using the FreeTrack protocol
PluginData.Description:
Adds head tracking support to Space Engineers 2
Compatible with any head tracking software using the "FreeTrack 2.0 Enhanced" protocol
Sensitivity and keybinds are configurable via the plugin settings
Check the plugin Settings or click More Info below for configuration instructions
